items.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.

items.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
items.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

items.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
items.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 切斷生命線！伊朗全國斷網70天破紀錄 每日經濟損失達12.5億元
items.summary: 伊朗自2月底美國和以色列對其展開軍事行動後，切斷全國網路，觀察組織NetBlocks於8日報告指出，伊朗斷網已達70天，再度改寫先前該國創下歷來全球斷網最久紀錄，也傷害其國內民...…

items.title: 扣押阿曼灣1艘油輪 伊朗：干擾我們石油出口
items.summary: 伊朗國營媒體今天引述軍方聲明報導，德黑蘭當局以涉嫌企圖干擾伊朗石油出口為由，扣押在阿曼灣（Gulf of Oman）的一艘油輪Ocean Koi。  聲明表示，這艘懸掛巴貝多國旗的油輪，...…

items.title: 中國籍女子疑竊取挪威機密衛星資訊 遭警方逮捕
items.summary: 挪威警方7日逮捕一名疑似在挪威進行情報活動的中國籍女子。挪威廣播公司報導，情報活動是透過一家在挪威登記的公司為掩護，試圖竊取與挪威國家安全高度相關的衛星資料。  挪威警察安全處（PST）...…
